title: hupolenion #5276
definition:
1) a vessel placed under a press (and in the Orient usually sunk
    in the earth) to receive the expressed juice of the grapes, a pit
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) a vessel placed under a press (and in the Orient usually sunk
    in the earth) to receive the expressed juice of the grapes, a pit

    NASB:  a vessel or trough beneath a winepress (to receive the juice):
